title: GustNov's Motorsport - Immersive Vehicles Pack
description: GustNov's Motorsport is a pack totally focused on motorsport in general, with a premise of having several cars from different categories around the world.
body:
**Discord server:**

https://discord.gg/hdV49QuXhb

------------------------------------------------------
**About the mod:**

Dive into the high-speed world of motorsport right from within Minecraft! This mod introduces legendary racing machines like Formula 1 cars, endurance prototypes, and GT racers. Whether you’re building a track day server or dreaming up your own Le Mans, this mod is made for gearheads and builders alike.

I'm open for criticism and tips.



**How to install:**

1- First of all, you have to have forge installed for minecraft version 1.12.2 / 1.16.5 / 1.18.2 / 1.19.2;

2- Then download the following mods:
- Immersive Vehicles
- GustNov's Motorsports 1.6.1

3- Go to where your .minecraft folder is located;

4- Put the mods listed in the folder called 'mods', if it doesn't exist, create one with the same name;

5- Open your game and have fun!
